title: olearia glutinosa
intro: Olearia glutinosa, also known as sticky daisy, is a shrub native to Australia with fragrant, white or pink flowers. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Olearia glutinosa include its ability to reduce inflammation and fever, as well as its potential to support immune function and alleviate respiratory issues. Olearia glutinosa is often prepared as a herbal tea or infused oil, and can also be used as a topical application for skin conditions and wounds.
